; --- globals ---
@.fmt.int_println = private unnamed_addr constant [4 x i8] c"%d\0A\00", align 1
@.str.0 = private unnamed_addr constant [4 x i8] c"big\00", align 1
@.str.1 = private unnamed_addr constant [7 x i8] c"medium\00", align 1
@.str.2 = private unnamed_addr constant [6 x i8] c"small\00", align 1

; --- declarations ---
declare i32 @puts(ptr)

; --- definitions ---
; @InputKt_classify
define ptr @InputKt_classify(i32 %arg0) {
entry:
  %merge_2 = alloca ptr
  %t0 = add i32 0, 1
  br label %bb1
bb1:
  %t1 = add i32 0, 10
  %t2 = icmp sgt i32 %arg0, %t1
  br i1 %t2, label %bb2, label %bb3
bb2:
  store ptr @.str.0, ptr %merge_2
  br label %bb6
bb3:
  %t3 = add i32 0, 3
  %t4 = icmp sgt i32 %arg0, %t3
  br i1 %t4, label %bb4, label %bb5
bb4:
  store ptr @.str.1, ptr %merge_2
  br label %bb6
bb5:
  store ptr @.str.2, ptr %merge_2
  br label %bb6
bb6:
  %t5 = load ptr, ptr %merge_2
  ret ptr %t5
}

; @main
define i32 @main() {
entry:
  %t0 = add i32 0, 15
  %t1 = call ptr @InputKt_classify(i32 %t0)
  call i32 @puts(ptr %t1)
  %t3 = add i32 0, 5
  %t4 = call ptr @InputKt_classify(i32 %t3)
  call i32 @puts(ptr %t4)
  %t6 = add i32 0, 1
  %t7 = call ptr @InputKt_classify(i32 %t6)
  call i32 @puts(ptr %t7)
  ret i32 0
}
